title: Xtra Tender Spanish Sweetcorn Paella
description: This earthy and tender Spanish dish features sweetcorn and is a quick-fix low-fat friendly option, it is made with dry brine and is ready in no time
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat
Add the Arborio rice and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly
Add the smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper, and cook for 1 minute
Add the dry white wine and cook until the liquid is almost completely absorbed
Add the chicken broth, one cup at a time, stirring constantly and allowing each cup to be absorbed before adding the next
After 20 minutes of cooking the rice, add the sweetcorn kernels and cook for an additional 5 minutes
Remove the skillet from the heat and let it rest, covered, for 5 minutes
Serve the paella hot, garnished with lemon wedges if desired
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
